blockingGaps: broader Earth-like realism still needs explicit mature-window re-audits with the weaker terrain-coupling default active in the live app

runtime smoothness is still not signed off; the latest live run again produced a degraded runtime summary with lineCount = 0
world-class status still requires realism and smoothness to pass in the same fresh live run
cycleInputs: latest runtime summary from npm run agent:summarize-runtime-log
